extension.summary: Amazon Fire TV Cube custom scripts
extension.description: CoreELEC and bootup customizations, includes copying CE to eMMC, syncing BT remotes between FireOS/CE, changing boot order, and more.
extension.news:
v1.8 (2026-06-26) - Decrease energy consuption during suspend by disabling USB devices, powering off USB port (when booting from eMMC). - Suspend stability improvements - Bug Fix: CE-NG wakeup from Kodi restart option black screen
v1.7 (2026-06-23) - Added new suspend option that stops Kodi on suspend, and restarts Kodi on wakeup. Wakeup is takes a few seconds longer, but Kodi is more stable. No difference in power savings between both options. - Detect if partial FireOS firmware download is present on eMMC, and give option to clear it to free storage space. - Bug Fix: improved CPU performance on wakeup. - Bug Fix: update suspend option for CE-NO.
v1.6 (2026-05-20) - Bug Fix: overclocking option for CE-NO.
v1.5 (2025-08-27) - Boot menu bug fixes. - BT sync fix for 'AR' remotes.
v1.4 (2025-07-21) - Improve CE WiFi speed by ~5-25%. Re-run BT remote sync and reboot to apply patch.
v1.3 (2025-07-17) - Added new boot menu
v1.2 (2025-07-12) - eMMC install fix to prevent Cube update message when Cube already updated.
v1.1 (2025-07-11) - New option to install CommandCraft app to FireOS (fork of Reboot to CoreELEC with all rebooting options for the Cube) - Addon wording changes, minor CE update tweak
v1.0 (2025-07-08) - Initial release
